data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Drug Expert Dr. Carl Hart Slams Cannabis Prohibition Amid Hemp-THC Surge
data.description: Dr. Carl Hart discusses hemp THC, unregulated markets, and the need for federal cannabis legalization to reduce risks and protect consumers.

data.title: Biogen Downgraded On Pipeline Setbacks And Leqembi Sales Slowdown
data.description: Jefferies downgrades Biogen with a reduced price target, citing pipeline setbacks, slow Leqembi sales, and challenges from declining Ocrevus royalties.

data.title: Looking Into Ensign Group's Recent Short Interest
El Salvador Relaxes Bitcoin Rules To Seal $1.3 Billion Loan
data.description: El Salvador close to $1.3B loan deal with IMF, contingent on changes to Bitcoin policy and fiscal deficit reduction. President Bukele focuses on economic revival and foreign investment.
